landing.tagline: PLAN.EX brings study planning, tasks, and working rhythm into one flow.
landing.subtitle: Planner, tasks, calendar, habits, tracker, and statistics work on the same surface. After passwordless sign-in, a short profile setup and guided onboarding inside the application take you directly into the flow.
landing.ctaTitle: Sign in without a password, finish the short setup, and move straight into planner rhythm.
landing.ctaDescription: Google and GitHub stand at the same level. Choose the provider you already use; the product flow stays the same.
landing.equalTrustNote: Both buttons lead into the same secure onboarding and planner flow.

providers.githubHint: The same safe flow with your developer account
providers.emailHint: Sign up or sign in with your email address

heroMeta.profile: Profile setup stays short and requirement-focused
heroMeta.onboarding: Onboarding runs inside the application interface

unified.title: Plan, tasks, and rhythm live together
unified.desc: Build your daily academic system inside one shell without moving across separate tools.

entry.title: Fast and secure OAuth entry
entry.desc: The first step is only provider choice and safe redirection.

real.title: Onboarding stays inside the application
real.desc: The first guide opens on the working interface rather than a separate marketing screen.

shell.label: Landing, setup, and work all open with the same product language.

providers.label: Google and GitHub keep equal hierarchy and lead to the same start.

onboarding.label: The first guide appears inside the application interface.

features.title: One productivity surface, six clear modules
features.subtitle: These cards explain the product directly. Planner, tasks, calendar, habits, tracker, and statistics stay readable in one visual language.

workflow.title: The first run stays coherent from entry to planner
workflow.subtitle: Landing, short profile setup, and onboarding remain part of the same product sequence.

future.title: Next modules stay marked on the roadmap
future.subtitle: These cards are informational roadmap markers for areas that may open later.

entry.title: Clean and secure OAuth entry
entry.desc: In the first second, the user only chooses a provider instead of facing an unnecessary form barrier.

profile.title: Short profile setup
profile.desc: Required fields are clear at first glance. Student-only fields appear only when the relevant choice is made.

onboarding.title: Guided start inside the application
onboarding.desc: The onboarding overlay runs on the application interface instead of a detached marketing page.

planner.title: Planner
planner.desc: Course structure, units, and academic planning stay anchored in one core area.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.desc: Personal and course tasks stay in one readable list with quick entry and active work visibility.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.desc: Exams, events, and deadlines stay visible in the same calendar rhythm.

habits.title: Habits
habits.desc: Today's routines, streak tracking, and quick marking stay compact and readable.

tracker.title: Tracker
tracker.desc: Time tracking and study sessions feed back into the same daily productivity flow.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.desc: Planner and tracker data merge into readable summaries of your working rhythm.

focus.title: Deep focus packs
focus.desc: Advanced pomodoro and focus flows can later open as paid modules.

insights.title: Deeper insight panels
insights.desc: Long-range comparisons and advanced reporting can arrive later as an extra layer.

cloud.title: Cloud history and snapshots
cloud.desc: Extra backup history and automation appear as roadmap markers, not hard upsell.

footer.caption: One CTA lane, short setup, and a calmer first impression.
